# perf-real-world: HTTP server with idiomatic fixes applied
lang: go
file: http_server-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package server

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
	"time"
)

func handleGet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	vals := r.URL.Query()
	page := vals.Get("page")
	size := vals.Get("size")
	sort := vals.Get("sort")

	name := strings.ReplaceAll(r.URL.Path, "/", "")
	w.Write([]byte("page=" + page + " size=" + size + " sort=" + sort + " name=" + name))
}

// NewServer creates an *http.Server with configured timeouts.
func NewServer(handler http.Handler) *http.Server {
	return &http.Server{
		Addr:         ":8080",
		Handler:      handler,
		ReadTimeout:  5 * time.Second,
		WriteTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
	}
}
